_comment: Tier-2 fixture verifying that deal.II's GridIn raises ExcMessage when fed a Gmsh mesh containing only triangles (in 2D, deal.II requires QUADS — Tri elements are unsupported in this version's Triangulation<2>). The pitfall this verifies is linear_elasticity#4: 'deal.II 2D ONLY reads QUADS from Gmsh — no triangles. Always set gmsh.option.setNumber(Mesh.RecombineAll, 1) to produce quads. Signal: ExcMessage from grid_in.cc that the mesh contains unsupported cell type.' We write a minimal Gmsh-format string with triangles to stdin and let GridIn::read_msh raise the documented exception.
